title: New to Monday - Complete your profile?
excerpt:
Hi all… 
How do I get rid of the “Complete your profile” box on the right side of inbox? 
I have already installed the mobile app and I have no more team members to invite… 
 
ALSO: 
How do I delete the folder that comes…

posts.author: JTL (James Bostock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all…

How do I get rid of the “Complete your profile” box on the right side of inbox?

I have already installed the mobile app and I have no more team members to invite…

Screenshot 2020-12-30 at 05.28.13658×574 35.3 KB

ALSO:

How do I delete the folder that comes preinstalled on my work space?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JTL, thanks for posting about this, and welcome to the community!

Can you write into support@monday.com about this? I ask because then we’ll be able to locate your monday.com account and grant you a feature from the back end that will remove the “Complete your profile” box.

There should be a three-dot menu if you mouse over the name of the board that will allow you do to delete it.
